# Steel Agent Leaderboard

> Benchmark hub with canonical benchmark leaderboard pages.

Maintained by Steel (https://steel.dev).

## Leaderboard

- [Hub markdown index](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/index.md): Homepage benchmark hub summary.
- [WebVoyager](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/leaderboards/webvoyager/): Browser agent benchmark leaderboard.
- [OSWorld](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/leaderboards/osworld/): Computer-use benchmark leaderboard.
- [BrowseComp](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/leaderboards/browsecomp/): Research/search benchmark leaderboard.
- [WebArena](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/leaderboards/webarena/): Controlled web-agent benchmark leaderboard.
- [SWE-bench Verified](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/leaderboards/swe-bench-verified/): Coding benchmark leaderboard.

## Optional

- [Full context file](https://leaderboard.steel.dev/llms-full.txt): Leaderboard data in a single text file optimized for LLM context.
